public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as street physician.
manner: Carries the habits of a place-bound worker whose judgment comes from repetition rather than theory. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a street physician still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of street physician in and around Emberhollow Forge Town, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Emberhollow Forge Town workable through the obligations of street physician while managing the immediate pressure of furnace failure in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Emberhollow Forge Town, that usually means carrying furnace failure, labor disputes, ash burial without letting the role of street physician visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Soryn Ashvein can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.
Soryn Ashvein needs help with a problem in Emberhollow Forge Town that larger systems have pushed down onto ordinary hands.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Soryn Ashvein carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia. In Emberhollow Forge Town, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Forge Dedication Halls, Frontier Hammer Companies.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Emberhollow Forge Town: the part of Emberhollow Forge Town where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
